# Silver Belt

> [!tip] 👑 Attachment · Cost: **0** · Leadership

![[505001.png]]

*Item. Gift.*

---

Attach to a **_Silvan_** or **_Hobbit_** hero. Limit 1 per hero.
**Response**: After a character you control leaves play, exhaust Silver Belt to give attached hero +1 ATK and +1 DEF until the end of the round.

---

> *…small silver belts, each with a clasp wrought like a golden flower. —The Fellowship of the Ring*

**Pack:** [[ALeP - The Mirror of Galadriel]] #1
